summary: Board first discussed exploring strategic alternatives including a potential sale of the Company.

summary: Board unanimously agreed to proceed with initial steps related to exploring strategic alternatives, including a potential sale. Appointed Mr. Nurkin and Mr. Squicciarino to oversee review.
type_fields: {"other_detail": "strategic_review", "process_kind": "other", "process_scope": null}

summary: Board concluded it was not an appropriate time to explore strategic alternatives or engage a financial advisor after hearing presentations from BofA Merrill Lynch and two other investment banks.
type_fields: {"other_detail": "Board decided not to proceed with strategic alternatives at this time", "process_kind": "other", "process_scope": null}

summary: Board concluded it was timely to revisit the previously discussed exploration of strategic alternatives.
type_fields: {"other_detail": "strategic_review", "process_kind": "other", "process_scope": null}

summary: Board decided to engage in a process to consider strategic alternatives. Unanimously approved engagement letter with BofA Merrill Lynch as financial advisor.

summary: Board unanimously approved moving forward with contacting potential buyers, executing confidentiality agreements and conducting meetings.
type_fields: {"other_detail": null, "process_kind": "sale_launch", "process_scope": null}
